package.name: patrol_perception
package.description: Perception & checkpoint capture for the patrol-drone stack (docset 04-perception). Hosts the ROS-free core — CheckpointConfigLoader / CheckpointResolver / CheckpointCaptureBuilder — that owns construction of the durable patrol_interfaces/msg/CheckpointCapture contract, plus (from M6.B) the thin PerceptionNode rclpy plumbing that samples the camera frame on a checkpoint-arrival trigger, identifies the checkpoint via off-the-shelf apriltag_ros, and publishes + persists the capture. M6.A lands the message + ROS-free core; M6.B adds the live node + detection wiring; M6.C adds on-disk persistence.
